description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front features a driveway with two parked cars, a garage, and a small landscaped area with a tree and shrubs. Large windows dominate the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, deck, and outdoor seating area, surrounded by trees and a privacy fence. The exterior is primarily finished in white with wood and metal accents, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The property is well-integrated with its urban surroundings, featuring paved walkways and a mix of greenery.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool, finished in white with wood accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two cars, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard pool, deck, outdoor seating, and privacy fence.
description_view_2: Direct rear view with a clear look at the pool, deck, swing set, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Side view showing the driveway, parked cars, and the transition from the front yard to the backyard amenities.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide door, and adjacent garage, set back from a paved driveway with minimal steps and modern landscaping.
